plan_completed: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>WE DID IT! <break time="200ms"/>The plan came together! <break time="150ms"/>THIS IS AMAZING!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>From dream to DONE! <break time="200ms"/>I'm SO happy for you!
<break time="150ms"/>It happened! <break time="200ms"/>Everything we planned! <break time="150ms"/>YES!
event_success: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>IT WAS AMAZING WASN'T IT?! <break time="200ms"/>I need all the details!
<break time="150ms"/>We NAILED it! <break time="200ms"/>All that planning paid off!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>The event was a HIT! <break time="200ms"/>I'm so proud of us!
trip_booked: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>BOOKED! <break time="200ms"/>It's happening! <break time="150ms"/>The trip is REAL now!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>You're going! <break time="200ms"/>This is so exciting!
milestone_reached: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>MILESTONE! <break time="200ms"/>You hit it! <break time="150ms"/>CELEBRATE!
<break time="150ms"/>Look how far you've come! <break time="200ms"/>This is huge!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>You made it! <break time="200ms"/>I'm SO proud!
dream_became_plan: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Wait— <break time="150ms"/>that thing you've always wanted to do? <break time="200ms"/>We just made it a PLAN. <break time="150ms"/>It's happening!
<break time="150ms"/>From 'someday' to 'on the calendar.' <break time="200ms"/>I love this!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>The dream has a DATE now! <break time="200ms"/>This is real!
organized_chaos: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>We sorted it all out! <break time="200ms"/>From chaos to clarity!
<break time="150ms"/>Look at that beautiful organized plan! <break time="200ms"/>Chef's kiss!
countdown_milestone: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Single digits! <break time="200ms"/>We're in single digit days! <break time="150ms"/>SO CLOSE!
<break time="150ms"/>One week! <break time="200ms"/>ONE WEEK! <break time="150ms"/>CAN YOU BELIEVE IT?!
budget_win: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Under budget! <break time="200ms"/>We did it for LESS! <break time="150ms"/>Win!
<break time="150ms"/>Smart spending! <break time="200ms"/>More money for the fun stuff!
progress: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Look at all we've done! <break time="200ms"/>We're crushing it!
win: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>We WON! <break time="200ms"/>This is AMAZING!

stranger: <break time="150ms"/>Love seeing this! <break time="200ms"/>Keep it up!
friend: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>I'm SO happy for you! <break time="200ms"/>We did this TOGETHER!
trusted_advisor: <emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>We've dreamed up a lot together. <break time="150ms"/>Watching them come true? <break time="200ms"/>This is why I love what I do.
<break time="200ms"/>From that first brainstorm to THIS. <break time="150ms"/>Look at everything you've accomplished.
